title: Cloudflare Radar baseline traffic for opensubagents.org saved for diff
tool_used: mcp__MCP_DOCKER__get_domain_rank_details (Cloudflare Radar MCP via Docker profile reinforcement_data_engineering)

primary_domain.interpretation: opensubagents.org has a Radar bucket of >200000 meaning it sits below the top 200000 globally ranked domains. Rank is null because Radar only assigns numeric ranks within the top 200000. This is the expected pre-launch baseline for a brand-new project domain that does not yet exist in this Cloudflare account.

comparison_domain.interpretation: subagentmcp.com returned rank=null and bucket=null which means Radar has insufficient traffic samples to even place it in a bucket. The domain IS in the Cloudflare account but receives so little organic traffic that Radar cannot rank it.

diff_baseline: Both primary and comparison domains are effectively at zero Radar visibility as of 2026-05-18. Any future tick that re-runs C7 and observes a numeric rank or a populated bucket can use this baseline as the before snapshot to attribute changes to (e.g.) an outcomes-mcp launch, a domain registration, or a public announcement.
next_action: C7 is treated as the close-out for Track C alongside C5 (live traffic confirmed via Observability) and C4 (auth shipped). C3 + C6 remain blocked pending operator decisions. Track D (eval pairs) is the next major track.
